tasks.title: Fix Google Places matching failure (15/19 leads get zero enrichment)
tasks.notes: Fixed: added _search_for_enrichment() without minRating/locationRestriction filters. Reduced stopwords to corporate suffixes only.

tasks.title: Fix Claude failsafe skip reason + consider weaker mode for zero-enrichment leads
tasks.notes: Fixed 2026-04-21: failsafe now runs on identity-only leads (company + city/address) even without grounded API evidence. Owner contact fields still blocked by CLAUDE_FAILSAFE_FIELDS allowlist. Skip reasons emitted dynamically via meta['__skip_reason'] with three specific cases. Tests updated in test_claude_failsafe_scope.py.

tasks.title: Investigate employee_count 126 for all leads (Openmart data issue)
tasks.notes: Fixed 2026-04-26: not an Openmart issue. Raw DB rows showed source='csv_import' with raw_data Employees='51 - 200'. csv_import._coerce_value() was converting employee bucket ranges to midpoint ints (51-200 -> 126, 51-100 -> 76). Importer now leaves ranged/plus employee counts null instead of inventing precise values; raw_data still preserves the original bucket.

tasks.title: Investigate missing email generation for all leads
tasks.notes: Closed 2026-04-26: not a live bug. Email generation/outreach was intentionally removed in favor of Notion export, so generated_subject/generated_email remaining blank is expected unless legacy rows already contain them. Investigation docs updated to reflect export as the terminal stage.
